mod.name: The Homesteader - Spore Galore
mod.description: Adds realistic gourmet & medicinal mushroom cultivation, mealworm farming, and integrated homesteading systems to Stardew Valley.
debug.list_mushrooms: Lists all mushroom types loaded in the mod.
debug.spawn_item: Spawns a mod item. Usage: sg_spawn_item <itemName> [quantity]
debug.test_contamination: Tests contamination chance for a mushroom type.
debug.reload_data: Reloads mushroom and substrate data from JSON files.
mail.demetrius.first_mushroom.title: Mushroom Cultivation Basics
mail.demetrius.first_mushroom.text: Hi @,^I noticed you found a wild mushroom! Did you know you can cultivate many mushroom species at home?^^The key is starting with a liquid culture, sterilizing your substrate, and maintaining proper conditions.^^Stop by sometime and I can share more about mycology!^   -Demetrius
mail.demetrius.equipment.title: Mushroom Cultivation Equipment
mail.demetrius.equipment.text: Dear @,^^I heard you've been experimenting with mushroom cultivation! As a fellow science enthusiast, I wanted to share something with you.^^I've enclosed plans for two essential pieces of equipment:^^The SUBSTRATE MIXER will help you prepare growing media from raw materials. It's a simple station - just stand near it to craft substrates.^^The CULTURE INCUBATOR is more advanced - it can create liquid cultures from wild mushrooms, and even clone existing cultures! Just add a mushroom, an empty jar, and some sugar, and it does the rest.^^With these tools, you can cultivate almost any mushroom you find!^^Happy cultivating!^   -Demetrius
